reasoning: Address lactate clearance and fatigue resistance with targeted over-unders. Last ride's low intensity indicates readiness for more intensive intervals. Improved performance on Alpine Loop requires effective handling of sustained efforts.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 2x15 minutes of over-unders: 2 min at 242-256W, 3 min at 201-218W. 5 minutes easy spin between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
